title: polygala obovata
intro: Polygala obovata, also known as Huang Jing, is a perennial plant native to China, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. It has been used to treat various health conditions, including kidney disease, diabetes, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Polygala obovata include improved kidney function, reduced blood sugar levels, and enhanced immune system function. Polygala obovata is commonly prepared as a decoction or tea, and sometimes combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulations.
